title: magnolia virolinensis
intro: Magnolia virolinensis, also known as the Mindanao evergreen magnolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia virolinensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made from the leaves or bark and are consumed as teas to harness its medicinal properties.
